name: Camping
description: Create forward bases that serve as respawn points, crafting stations, safe areas for healing, and defenses. Camps benefit other players, earning you XP.

nodes.name: Basic Campsite
nodes.description: Deploy a simple camp with a bedroll (respawn point). Limited duration.

nodes.name: Field Crafting Station
nodes.description: Add a basic crafting bench to your camp. Other players can use it.

nodes.name: Camp Defenses
nodes.description: Place defensive structures around your camp. Deters creatures.

nodes.name: Safe Zone Projection
nodes.description: Your camp radiates a safe area where wounds can heal and entertainment skills function.

special.name: Fortified Camp
special.description: Doubles camp duration and defense radius.
